ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL to the package's repository */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the package */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall security score for the package */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the package */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license under which the package is distributed */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars the package has received on its repository */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks the package has */,
  "open_issues" INTEGER /* Number of open issues in the package's repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security metric */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the metric belongs to */,
  "binary_artifacts" INTEGER /* Binary artifacts score */,
  "branch_protection" INTEGER /* Branch protection score */,
  "cii_best_practices" INTEGER /* CII best practices score */,
  "code_review" INTEGER /* Code review score */,
  "dangerous_workflow" INTEGER /* Dangerous workflow score */,
  "dependency_update_tool" INTEGER /* Dependency update tool score */,
  "fuzzing" INTEGER /* Fuzzing score */,
  "license" INTEGER /* License score */,
  "maintained" INTEGER /* Maintained score */,
  "packaging" INTEGER /* Packaging score */,
  "pinned_dependencies" INTEGER /* Pinned dependencies score */,
  "sast" INTEGER /* SAST score */,
  "security_policy" INTEGER /* Security policy score */,
  "signed_releases" INTEGER /* Signed releases score */,
  "token_permissions" INTEGER /* Token permissions score */,
  "vulnerabilities" INTEGER /* Vulnerabilities score */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metrics were last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the security metrics */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_metrics_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the package */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the package version */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash of the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed release notes for the version */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the specific version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_security_metrics" (
  "version_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version security metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the metric belongs to */,
  "binary_artifacts" INTEGER /* Binary artifacts score */,
  "branch_protection" INTEGER /* Branch protection score */,
  "cii_best_practices" INTEGER /* CII best practices score */,
  "code_review" INTEGER /* Code review score */,
  "dangerous_workflow" INTEGER /* Dangerous workflow score */,
  "dependency_update_tool" INTEGER /* Dependency update tool score */,
  "fuzzing" INTEGER /* Fuzzing score */,
  "license" INTEGER /* License score */,
  "maintained" INTEGER /* Maintained score */,
  "packaging" INTEGER /* Packaging score */,
  "pinned_dependencies" INTEGER /* Pinned dependencies score */,
  "sast" INTEGER /* SAST score */,
  "security_policy" INTEGER /* Security policy score */,
  "signed_releases" INTEGER /* Signed releases score */,
  "token_permissions" INTEGER /* Token permissions score */,
  "vulnerabilities" INTEGER /* Vulnerabilities score */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metrics were last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the security metrics */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_security_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES package_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, security analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the package */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the package */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the package */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vulnerabilities" (
  "vulnerability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vulnerability */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the vulnerability belongs to */,
  "vulnerability_name" TEXT /* Name of the vulnerability */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the vulnerability (e.g., critical, high, medium, low) */,
  "cvss_score" REAL /* CVSS score for the vulnerability */,
  "cve_id" TEXT /* CVE ID for the vulnerability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vulnerability */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the vulnerability was published */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the vulnerability information was last modified */,
  "exploitability_score" REAL /* Exploitability score for the vulnerability */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Impact score for the vulnerability */,
  "references" TEXT /* References to additional information about the vulnerability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vulnerability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vulnerabilities_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_vulnerabilities" (
  "version_vulnerability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version vulnerability */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the vulnerability belongs to */,
  "vulnerability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vulnerability */,
  "introduced_in_version" TEXT /* Version in which the vulnerability was introduced */,
  "fixed_in_version" TEXT /* Version in which the vulnerability was fixed */,
  "fixed_in_commit" TEXT /* Commit hash where the vulnerability was fixed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the vulnerability in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_vulnerability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_vulnerabilities_vulnerability_id FOREIGN KEY ("vulnerability_id") REFERENCES vulnerabilities ("vulnerability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_vulnerabilities_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES package_versions ("version_id")
)
